items.name_en: New Arrivalрҹ…°пёҸрҹ…°пёҸ CE TILLY Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
New Arrivalрҹ…°пёҸрҹ…°пёҸ CE TILLY Shoulder Bag
CE's best-selling shoulder bag, handwoven body with natural warmth in every texture. Get close and smell the faint scent of grass and wood, as if storing the freshness of the entire summer.
рҹӘ§The handle is paired with soft cowhide, adding durability and cleverly balancing the rusticity of the straw with the premium feel of the leather, simple and exquisite, complementing the overall style.
рҹ’јDon't let its small appearance fool you, it holds a lot! The interior space is organized, easily accommodating daily essentials like a phone, wallet, sunscreen, and lipstick. The built-in inner pocket is perfect for important cards and keys, making them easy to access.
рҹҢҹAnd it is simply a "universal player" in styling. Pair it with a white dress for a lazy French vacation vibe at the beach, the photo atmosphere is maxed out.
For daily wear with simple T-shirts and jeans, it becomes the finishing touch, adding a touch of sophistication and casualness to a casual outfit. Whether for vacation, picnics, or shopping, it fits perfectlyвң…
Model:115703
Color:Raffia/Brown
Size:22x13.5x4cm (with original packaging)
